titleStmt.title: SII 26.110: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 110. (A.R. No. 107 of 1909.) KOMARALIṄGAM, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the Veṅkaṭēśa-perumāḷ temple.

This damaged inscription records a sale of land by Amaṭṭaṉ-Kāri Ilaṅkaimāṉ, a maṉṟāḍi of Iraṭṭaiyaṉpāḍi in Vaikāvi-nāḍu to Tambirān-tōḻaṉ an ascetic of the Tirunīṟiṭṭān-tirumaḍam, situated in the tirumaḍai-viḷāgam of the temple of Āḷuḍaiyār Muttiṟattīśiramūḍaiyār at Koḻumam in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . virarāceṉtira tevaṟku tiruveḻuttiṭṭuc cellāniṉṟa tirunalli yaāṇṭu 10 5 vatiṉ Etiṟ 4vatu vaiykāvināṭṭu Iraṭṭaiyaṉpāṭiyil maṉṟāṭikaḷi
l Amaṭṭaṉ kāriyāṉa Ilaṅkaimāṉeṉ karaivaḻināṭṭuk koḻumattu Āḷuṭaiyār muttiṟatticiramuṭaiyār tirumaṭaiviḷākattu tiruniṟiṭṭān tirumaṭatti
ṟ kumpiṭṭirukkun tavaciyāṟ tampirāntoḻaṟku nāṉ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Iṭṭikaittuṟai manṉaṟaiyil nāṅkaḷ Ūriṉpakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya puṟamacakkaṭa
nilaṅ kāṇiyaraikkāṇi muntirikaikku nāṉkellaiyāvatu kuḷattuvāykkālukku meṟkum Uḷḷur Emperumāṉukku nāṉ tirunaṉtavaṉamākaviṭṭa kuṟaikku vaṭak
kum peruvāykkālukku kiḻakkum kuḷattuvāykkālukkum peruvāykkālukkum maṭap puṟamākak koṇṭa kollaikkut teṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa ni
laṅ kāṇiyaraikkāṇi muntirikaiyum maṭappuṟamāka viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ
cata Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ ciriyakki paḻañcalākai Accu Eṭṭum paḻaṅkācu Oṉṟukkum
Iṉṉilaṅ kāṇiyaraikkāṇi muntirikaikkum Iṟukkukkuṭimeykkaṭamai vitai yāṭṭiyāl
Itu cantrādittavaṟ celvatāka Itu paṉmsvaveṟ
Ilaṅkaimāṉeṉ Immaṭattukku maṭappuṟamāka Innilattu
vilaiyaṟa viṟṟu maṭappuṟamāka Ilaṅkaimāṉeṉ
Digital edition of SII 26.110 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
